item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Sometimes I love the internet
item.description:
Before 1969, every state in the US required "fault" to get a divorce. Abuse. Adultery. Abandonment. Insanity. You had to prove it, in court, and in front of a judge who could decide your suffering wasn't sufficient. One judge told a woman it was "better that a few suffer and lie in the bed which they voluntarily made" than weaken the institution of marriage. Before 1974, a woman could not open a bank account, get a credit card, or take out a loan without her husband's signature. If she was single, she needed a male relative to cosign. Some banks discounted women's wages by 50% when calculating credit limits. If she divorced and the credit was in his name, her credit history vanished and she started from zero. Before 1993, marital rape was not a crime in all 50 states. The law literally defined rape as intercourse with a woman "not his wife." A husband could not rape his wife. That was the law. Saying no to sex was not recognized as a right. Saying no to sex was grounds for him to divorce her. In 1950, only 33.9% of women were in the workforce. By 1990, that number was 57.5%. Women didn't start leaving marriages because Disney lied to them. Women started leaving marriages because they could finally afford to. Because they could finally get a bank account. Because the law finally acknowledged that forced sex in marriage was still rape. Because they no longer had to prove to a judge that the abuse was bad enough. After states passed no-fault divorce laws, female suicide dropped 20%. Domestic violence dropped 30%. Women murdered by their partners declined 10%. Those are not the numbers of women chasing fairytales. Those are the numbers of women escaping. Women initiate 69% of divorces. And it's not because they watched too much Disney. - Jodi LaCroix Sources: Bureau of Labor Statistics, Stevenson & Wolfers (2006) "Bargaining in the Shadow of the Law" (NBER/Quarterly Journal of Economics), Equal Credit Opportunity Act (1974), American Sociological Association (Rosenfeld, 2015), U.S. Department of Justice
Can confirm, after experiencing the level of sexual harassment I do on a regular basis while out in public
item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.title: Four-star General Donahue who resigned after pressure tied to Pete Hegseth’s leadership. This is the respect he was shown as he left his home and his post. How can we trust our military leadership now? Time to put the Constitution first.

item.title: Belgium wins 4-1 against USA !
item.description: Calvin and Habs. Love these guys https://www.youtube.com/@calvinandhabs/shorts https://youtube.com/shorts/4_s6htcYrM4?si=jnV99Lo9S_UDhlcR If Team USA had any honour, they would've benched Balogun for the match against Belgium to show they respect the rules, even if FIFA and their own President don't. They didn't do this. They chose to play with an unfair advantage given to them through corruption, and still got their butts kicked. Way to go Belgium!

item.description:

20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Al Santos
"Don't be yourself. Be someone a little nicer." - Mignon McLaughlin So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Memes vol 719
item.description:
Jesus fucking Christ
I wish my name was Pelican Guidry
At my great grandma’s funeral I was talking to my uncle and I very confidently asked him “how’s Shwarma?” (Her name is SHAMMA) and I realized what I had done halfway through the ceremony and I was FIGHTING to not lose my shit
Bruce tax
Gertie tax
Nessie tax
